title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
author: Hayden Field
raw_description: A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude. In the coming weeks, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon (D-PA) are planning to debut a new version of the Health and Location […]
summary: 美国议员提出新法案，禁止AI公司向数据经纪人出售用户的健康和位置信息，包括ChatGPT等聊天机器人收集的数据。
analysis_note: 政策新闻，与AI技术本身关联度低，但涉及AI数据隐私议题，有一定参考价值。
